posts.author: michael3 (michael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Developer team,

I think it would be a great benefit to include export function for the email and activities as part of CRM solution. We might need to share the information to external party for the conversation threads or activites trail. Will it something that be supported in the future?

Regards,
Michael
